identity.name: *here | there by Howard Rideout (TSA / Todmorden Mills)
identity.address: East York / Don Valley (67 Pottery Rd)

narrative.summary: Architect's vision for a Muskoka nature preserve & sculpture garden — charcoal drawings, photography, film. Three realms of wilderness in the Papermill Gallery. Opens April 1. Free admission. Architecture-meets-landscape art. Worth a deliberate stop for John’s design/architecture/art/food radar.
